recommendations:
Amy Woodcock

I had the pleasure of being managed by and working with Nick for over three years at Curvestone. During this time, I was consistently impressed by his professionalism, calm demeanour, and considered leadership style. Nick has a remarkable ability to foster trust, creating an environment where everyone feels valued and empowered.

As a CTO Nick extends these qualities to client relationships as well, becoming a trusted point of contact for technical leaders, addressing questions offering advice to ensure the seamless and successful delivery of Curvestone-built solutions. 

His leadership is grounded in empowering teams and building their confidence. Nick is unflappable, handling challenges with empathy and reason, which inspires those around him to approach problems with the same level-headedness. 

Nick is always on the lookout for opportunities to help his team develop and grow. He encourages us to take on new challenges, ensuring we feel confident without causing panic. His exceptional communication skills are key to his success as a leader. Nick understands that motivating high-performing teams requires keeping them informed about company strategy and goals, and he excels at highlighting how each team’s efforts contribute to the bigger vision.

Through Nick’s mentorship and leadership, I have made significant leaps in my professional development. His guidance has been invaluable, and I am grateful for the positive impact he has had on my career.

Marcin Polak

I had the privilege of working under Nick's leadership, and I can confidently say that he is an exceptional leader and an invaluable asset to any team. Nick possesses remarkable leadership qualities that inspire and motivate those around him. He has an innate ability to handle uncomfortable and inconvenient situations with grace and composure, ensuring that challenges are met with effective solutions. His technical knowledge is unparalleled, allowing him to navigate complex issues with ease and precision.

Working with Nick has been a true pleasure. He is always eager to help and consistently demonstrates a proactive approach to problem-solving. His dedication to his team and his willingness to support and guide others make him not only a great manager but also a genuinely great person.

I am confident that Nick is the perfect candidate for any head or C-level role. His expertise, leadership skills, and commitment to excellence will undoubtedly drive success and innovation within any organization.

Amy Woodcock
